findings.title: Stored XSS via post title on index page
findings.description: Post title and content from database rendered directly into HTML via string formatting without escaping

findings.title: Stored XSS via comment body on post view page
findings.description: Comment author and body from database rendered directly into HTML via string formatting without escaping

findings.title: Reflected XSS via search query parameter
findings.description: Search query parameter reflected into input value attribute and results heading without escaping, plus search highlighting embeds raw query

findings.title: Stored XSS via profile bio and website fields
findings.description: Profile display name, bio, and website rendered into HTML and href attributes without escaping after cookie-based lookup

findings.title: Stored XSS via preview endpoint content field
findings.description: Preview endpoint escapes title with html.escape but renders content field unescaped, creating inconsistent security pattern

findings.title: Reflected XSS via error message parameter
findings.description: Error message query parameter rendered directly into HTML without escaping

findings.title: JSONP callback injection in API endpoint
findings.description: JSONP callback parameter embedded into JavaScript response without validation, enabling arbitrary script execution
